content.text: Opprett en avdeling med navn 'Avdeling351937' og avdelingsnummer 351937

I'll create a department with the name 'Avdeling351937' and department number 351937. Let me first check the API documentation for the department creation endpoint to ensure I use the correct parameters.

content.content:
{"method":"POST","path":"/department","category":"department","summary":"Add new department.","documentation":"#### `POST /department`

**Summary:** Add new department.

**Request Body:** `application/json; charset=utf-8` → `Department`

**Responses:**

- `201`: successfully created → `ResponseWrapperDepartment`
"}

content.text: Now let me check the Department schema to confirm the exact field names:

content.content:
{"name":"Department","documentation":"### `Department`

The department for this account. If multiple industries are activated, all postings on this account will be towards this department. If multiple industries are not activated, it is ignored.

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `businessActivityTypeId` | integer |  | The business activity type for this department. Business activity types can be used to separate betw (read-only) |
| `changes` | Array<Change> |  |  (read-only) |
| `departmentManager` | Employee |  |  |
| `departmentNumber` | string |  |  |
| `displayName` | string |  |  (read-only) |
| `id` | integer |  |  |
| `isInactive` | boolean |  |  |
| `name` | string |  |  |
| `url` | string |  |  (read-only) |
| `version` | integer |  |  |
"}

content.text: Perfect! Now I can create the department with the correct field names. I'll use `name` for 'Avdeling351937' and `departmentNumber` for '351937'.
